up.method: metabolomics + RNA-Seq; arginine consumed and catabolized via arginine deiminase pathway (99.6% of arginine uptake flux to ATP generation per model)
targeted metabolomics: in EDM1 with 1 mM sodium acetate, acetate depleted to ~limit of quantification during growth (3 strains: DSM 2243, AB8n2, Valencia); not depleted at 10 mM

sec.method: metabolomics: produced by E. lenta (arginine deiminase pathway output)
metabolomics: produced by E. lenta (arginine deiminase pathway output)

growth_records.cite: Noecker, Cecilia et al. Systems biology elucidates the distinctive metabolic niche filled by the human gut microbe Eggerthella lenta. PLOS Biology (2023). DOI:10.1371/journal.pbio.3002125. [PMC10234575]
growth_records.method: reported (experimental median of growthcurver logistic-fit growth rate r, harmonic-mean averaged across replicates); doubling_time calculated td=ln2/mu=0.6931/0.32=2.17 h
growth_records.snippet: Flux balance analysis of the final model estimated the maximum growth rate of E. lenta DSM 2243 in EDM1 to be 0.96 h-1, higher than experimental values (median 0.32 h-1; S2B Fig).
growth_records.notes: Genome-scale reconstruction (iEL2243_2) paper for E. lenta. ONLY quantitative MEASURED growth-physiology value in the article body is the experimental specific growth rate: median 0.32 h-1 in EDM1 (growthcurver logistic fit, r reported as harmonic mean across replicates). Doubling time calculated: td=ln2/mu=0.6931/0.32=2.17 h. FBA-predicted max mu=0.96 h-1 (PREDICTED, not experimental; also 0.54 h-1 in agmatine-based EDM1, predicted). Model uptake constraints were DERIVED from defined-media concentrations via Cobra concToCellRate using approximate cell dry weight 3.3e-13 g and a fixed 1 mM/gDW/h cap for untargeted-metabolomics compounds -> these are constraints, NOT measured fluxes. Uptake/secretion of arginine, acetate, ornithine, citrulline are reported qualitatively (metabolomics shifts / FVA direction), so rate=null with is_experimental=true only for direction. Acetate depletion to LOQ observed experimentally in 1 mM (not 10 mM) EDM1 for 3 strains (DSM 2243, AB8n2, Valencia). A separate RNA-Seq energy-source experiment spiked reduced-carbon EDM1 with L-arginine to 86 mM, sodium acetate to 14.5 mM, or agmatine sulfate to 30 mM (final). Comparative modeling of 24 strains uses PREDICTED (FBA) growth, not measured. Conditions: anaerobic (2-5% H2, 20% CO2, bal. N2), 37 C, batch.

phenotypes.base_medium: Sole-substrate growth / assimilation on a defined minimal medium (substrate as C/N/energy source) — positive = the organism grows on it
